expertQuotes.title: Industry Leaders Recognize Transparency
expertQuotes.subtitle: Expert insights on blockchain transparency and auditability

0.quote: True transparency is the foundation of DeFi. When every transaction is verifiable on-chain, users can fully understand and control their assets.
0.author: Vitalik Buterin
0.title: Ethereum Co-founder

1.quote: Blockchain explorers are the cornerstone of trust in decentralized systems. The ability for anyone to verify eliminates the need for centralized intermediaries.
1.author: Andreas Antonopoulos
1.title: Blockchain Educator & Author

2.quote: Security and transparency complement each other. Open auditability is the proof of a truly secure system.
2.author: Samczsun
2.title: Paradigm Security Researcher

expertQuotes.disclaimer: * Quotes represent general industry perspectives and are not direct endorsements of Quantum Shield.

cta.title: Start Exploring Now
cta.description: Experience the transparency of the Quantum Shield protocol. All transactions are verifiable on-chain.

meta.title: Explorer | Quantum Shield
meta.description: View Quantum Shield protocol statistics, locks, unlocks, and challenges

tvl.label: Total Value Locked
tvl.tooltip: TVL (Total Value Locked) = The total amount of assets currently locked in Quantum Shield

activeProvers.label: Active Provers
activeProvers.tooltip: Provers = Independent verifiers that validate unlock requests. 2 of 5 are randomly selected to approve each request

activeChallenges.title: Active Challenges
activeChallenges.titleTooltip: Challenge = A mechanism to flag and dispute suspicious unlock requests

meta.title: All Locks | Explorer | Quantum Shield
meta.description: View all assets locked in Quantum Shield

filters.searchPlaceholder: Filter by Lock ID or Address...

fields.blockNumberTooltip: Block Number = The Ethereum block number where this lock was recorded
fields.dilithiumKeyTooltip: Dilithium Key = A quantum-resistant cryptographic key that proves ownership of this lock
fields.l2TxHashTooltip: L2 TX = Transaction recorded on Layer 2 (faster and cheaper processing layer)

emptyState.title: No Locks Found
emptyState.description: There are no locks to display

notFound.title: Lock Not Found
notFound.description: The specified Lock ID does not exist or has been removed.

fields.blockNumberTooltip: Block Number = The Ethereum block number where this lock was recorded
fields.dilithiumKeyTooltip: Dilithium Key = A quantum-resistant cryptographic key that proves ownership
fields.l2TxHashTooltip: L2 TX = Transaction recorded on Layer 2
fields.l1TxHashTooltip: L1 TX = Transaction recorded on Ethereum Mainnet

notFound.title: Unlock Not Found
notFound.description: The specified Unlock ID does not exist or has been removed.

fields.typeTooltip: Type = Indicates whether this is a normal unlock (24h wait) or emergency unlock (7 days wait, all Provers must approve)
fields.timeLockEndTooltip: Time Lock End = After this time, the assets can be withdrawn
fields.signatureHashTooltip: Signature Hash = Hash of the quantum-resistant signature generated with the Dilithium key
fields.l2TxHashTooltip: L2 TX = Transaction recorded on Layer 2

meta.title: All Unlocks | Explorer | Quantum Shield
meta.description: View all unlock requests on Quantum Shield

table.proverSigsTooltip: Prover Sigs = How many of 5 independent verifiers have approved this unlock (e.g., 3/5 = 3 of 5 have signed)

emptyState.title: No Unlocks Found
emptyState.description: There are no unlocks to display

meta.title: Analytics | Explorer | Quantum Shield
meta.description: View Quantum Shield protocol analytics data

sections.tvlTooltip: TVL = Total Value Locked trend over time

proverUptime.title: Prover Uptime
proverUptime.avgResponseTimeTooltip: Average time to respond to signature requests

challengeRate.title: Challenge Rate
challengeRate.rateTooltip: Percentage of unlocks that received challenges

stats.avgLockDurationTooltip: Average time from lock to unlock completion
stats.successRateTooltip: Percentage of unlocks completed without challenges

meta.title: All Provers | Explorer | Quantum Shield
meta.description: View all Provers on Quantum Shield

info.title: About Provers
info.description: Provers are independent verifiers that validate unlock requests. When an unlock is requested, 2 of 5 Provers are randomly selected and must approve with their signatures. This distributed verification mechanism protects your assets from unauthorized unlocks.

meta.title: About Explorer | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Overview and guide for Quantum Shield Explorer

hero.title: Enabling Protocol Transparency
hero.subtitle: Quantum Shield Explorer is a transparent dashboard that tracks all Locks, Unlocks, and Challenges in real-time.

whatIs.title: What is Quantum Shield Explorer
whatIs.description: Quantum Shield Explorer is a tool that visualizes all activity on the Quantum Shield protocol. Monitor asset locks, unlock requests, and challenge states in real-time.

search.title: Advanced Search
search.description: Quickly search by Address, TX Hash, or Lock ID

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Visualize TVL trends, volume, and Prover performance

transparency.title: Full Transparency
transparency.description: All transactions and challenges are public

lock.title: 1. Lock
lock.description: User locks ETH in Quantum Shield

unlock.title: 2. Unlock Request
unlock.tooltip: Dilithium signature = A next-generation digital signature that cannot be cracked by quantum computers

prover.title: 3. Prover Verification
prover.description: 2 of 5 Provers randomly selected to sign
prover.tooltip: Prover = Independent verifiers that validate unlock requests. Multiple parties verify to prevent fraud

complete.title: 5. Complete
complete.description: Assets become withdrawable after wait period
